checks.summary: All reviewed support schemas parse as draft-07.
Validation and install examples structurally match their schemas.
Docs, schemas and examples agree on business, operator and support artifact roles.
Validation and install templates remain projection-only and map to structured contracts.
Every registry sourcePath resolves to an authored SKILL.md.
All authored skills keep valid minimal frontmatter with name and description.
Install-plan and validation checks are structurally ready, but optional format tooling gaps should remain visible during verification.

warnings: Optional format tooling gaps remain warnings and are not normalized into a full pass.
assumptions: Repo readiness is limited to planning/control-plane verification readiness and does not imply runtime product readiness.
